titleStmt.title: SII 16.184: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 184. (A.R. No. 156 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPUR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the antarāḷa-maṇḍapa of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1474, Paridhāvi, Śrāvaṇa śu. 15, corresponding to 1552 A.D., August 4, Thursday, °50, lunar eclipse.

It registers a grant of ten villages, viz., Tarnubāḍu, Korevānipalle, Mēḍiśeṭṭipalle, Gaṅgireḍḍipalle, Jammuladinne, Tellabōḍu, Kōmaṭikuṇṭa, Sūrēpalle, Vānālapuram and Chennāreḍḍipalle, situated in Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma to god Chennakēśava of Mārakāpuram by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju who is said to have obtained Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śubhamastu . śrīmatē rāmānujāya namaḥ śrīmatkēśavadēvasya mārakā puravāsinaḥ . catu¨rdaśānāṁ lōkānāṁ prabhō¨rdīvyati śāsanaṁ . svastiśrī jayā bhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1474 Agunēṁṭi
paridhāvisaṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śudha 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucu
nnuṁḍaṁgānu Akhilalōkārādhyulaina mārakāpura śrīcannakēśavarāyala śrīpādapadmaṁbu laku śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju pedaśrīraṁgayadēva mahārājuluṁgāri komā ruṁḍu tirumalayyadēva mahārājuluṁ
gāru daṇaṁ sama¨rpiṁci yiccina bhūdānadha¨rmaśāsanakramamu yeṭlaṁnnanu sadāśivadēva mahārāyaluṁgāru mā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁpanavadariṁccina kocca¨rlakōṭa sīmalōni ta¨rnubāḍu korevānipalle mēḍiśeṭṭi
palle gaṁggire(re)ḍḍipalle jaṁmuladinna tellabōḍu kōmaṭikuṁṭṭa sūrēpalle vānālapuraṁ cannā reḍḍipalla saha grāmālu padiṁnni śrīcaṁnnakēśavarāyalaku sama¨rpiṁstimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
